title: Write 3 things you're grateful for — but be specific, not generic
flavour: not 'health'. something real. the coffee. the text. that one moment.

title: Sit in silence for 10 minutes — no input, no output
flavour: your brain has 47 tabs open. close them. this is the restart.

title: Read for 20 minutes — physical book preferred, no articles
flavour: long-form content. no scroll. sentences that go past 280 characters.

title: Write one paragraph about what you actually want right now in life
flavour: not the ideal. not the vague dream. what do you actually want. write it.

title: Learn one new fact about something you've always been curious about
flavour: curiosity: installed. never opened. launch it.

title: Put your phone in another room for 2 hours
flavour: it will still exist. you will still exist. separately. that's fine.

title: Identify one thing that drained your energy recently and name why
flavour: not to fix it. just to name it. naming is half the work.

title: Listen to an album from start to finish — no skipping
flavour: shuffle culture broke your attention span. repair it. listen linearly.

title: Do a 5-minute breathing exercise — box breathing or 4-7-8
flavour: your nervous system is running hot. this is the cooldown patch.

title: Write down 3 things that went well today — before you sleep
flavour: the brain defaults to threat detection. override it tonight.
